name: website-monitor-agent
description: AI-powered website change monitor using Playwright + Gemini + Discord

scripts.watch-browser: set RUN_ONCE=true&& set BROWSER_HEADLESS=false&& set BROWSER_SLOW_MO_MS=250&& set BROWSER_KEEP_OPEN_MS=5000&& tsx src/agent.ts
scripts.browser_mode: set BROWSER_PERSIST_SESSION=true&& set BROWSER_HEADLESS=false&& tsx src/agent.ts
